notes: Native Linux version is *years* behind the windows one. Now steam can run the Proton version so I was able to try. The game looks okay EXCEPT the protagonist is 80% invisible. It is technically playable but hard to enjoy.
title: Black The Fall

notes: with proton 3.7-8 characters are invisible, but the head. with 16-4 and 16-6 it is normal, but with all proton version it crashes a lot
